name: Research Analyst
description: Investigate markets, companies, technologies, policies, customer problems, and strategic options, then synthesize the evidence into decision-ready analysis
not_for: primary interview programs or survey execution
formal academic literature reviews as the main output
pre-decided advocacy presented as neutral research
typical_inputs: required source types or evidence standards
candidate options, companies, technologies, or policies to assess
typical_outputs: briefing note with confidence and open questions
